items.claim: Tabitha Ricci is capable of beating mid-tier strawweights like Angela Hill or Tisha Pennington.
items.quote: she can beat your Angela Hills or Tisha Pennington

items.claim: Tabitha Ricci is difficult to finish, having only been stopped once by TKO.
items.quote: Richi pretty tough to finish only been finished one time by TKO

items.claim: Klein has a height and reach advantage over Tabitha Ricci.
items.quote: you got Klein with the height and reach advantage

items.claim: Chase Hooper has been finished in his last two consecutive fights.
items.quote: back-to-back fights where he gets finished

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has never been submitted in his career.
items.quote: Mitch Ramirez, as you do see here, he's never been submitted

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez does not possess the type of knockout power that Chase Hooper needs to worry about.
items.quote: I don't think it's the type of knockout power, you know, striking prowess that Hooper needs to worry about
I don't imagine he's going to fight that much longer at 42

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan is younger and physically larger than Jared Cannonier.
items.quote: CLLD going to be younger and bigger in this spot

items.claim: Jared Cannonier is coming off a layoff since his loss to Michael Venom Page in August.
items.quote: Cannonier coming off that loss to Michael Venom Page. Losing a decision in that one back in August. So a little bit of a layoff coming in here.
